resources.string: 此服務用於唇語輸入法，將辨識結果自動填入文字框中。
1. Tap the floating window to expand it
2. Tap the X button to collapse the floating window
3. Tap Record to start lip-reading input
4. The frame turns red to indicate recording
5. Tap Stop to end lip-reading input
6. When moving on to the next
7. Tap a candidate word to finish
